channel.title: Vatsalya Awasthi — Writing
channel.description: Notes on strategy, new business, and operating in an AI-native way.

item.title: I Set Out to Build a Website. I Built a System Instead.
item.description: A website is a noun; what I needed was a verb. Build notes on a site that runs itself, and what it taught me about delegation.

item.title: Plateaus Are the Point
item.description: A spacecraft, six years on — why the plateau isn't a pause in your progress. It is the progress.
